description: Update third-party package dependencies in the e2e-test plugin to their latest versions.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Update e2e-test plugin dependencies to latest versions
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the e2e-test plugin dependencies updated to their latest compatible versions.
acceptanceCriteria: ESLint major version (9→10) is NOT bumped
npm install completes without errors (run from plugins/e2e-test/)
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run build passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes: Edit plugins/e2e-test/package.json. Only typescript-eslint needs bumping (^8.56.0→^8.56.1, a patch version). All other deps are already at latest. Run `cd plugins/e2e-test && npm install && npm run check` to verify. This is a trivial update.
